Author: Aschy
Name: BagAssistant
Punchline: Rule-based inventory sorter with comprehensive filters.
Description: Define a stack of sorting rules and BagAssistant will route items to the right bag every time. Filter by item category, rarity, level range, item level, class/job, HQ, tradeable, name match, vendor price, item ID and more. Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom (first match wins), making it easy to model anything from 'all HQ gear -> Bag 1' to 'all crafting materials below ilvl 600 -> Bag 4'.
Changelog:
v1.0.4: Full feature pack - Extract Materia (100% spiritbond gear), Merge Stacks (consolidate duplicates), Group Vendor Trash (white items to Bag 4), Natural Language Search (type 'combat', 'heal', 'craft', 'spiritbond', etc. to find items), Layout Snapshot & Mirror (capture and sync bag layouts). Advanced tab with search UI and layout tools. All features on overlay + main window.
v1.0.3: Advanced sorting & undo - Meet 'The Gatherer' (crystals first, mats grouped), 'The Raider' (raid-focused), and 'The Hoarder' (grouped by rarity). New Delete Junk button discards white (vendor trash) items instantly. Full undo history - reverse any sort with one click. Faster execution by default (40-80ms vs 80-160ms). Config migration for existing users.
v1.0.2: Inventory overlay buttons - floating 'Smart Sort' and configurable rule buttons appear above the inventory window while it's open and disappear when you close it. Overlay can be disabled and the rule button is configurable in Settings.
v1.0.1: New 'Quick Sort' tab with one-click presets - 'Smart Sort Everything' (gear/food/materials/crystals to dedicated bags) plus targeted presets (HQ Gear, Food + Medicine, Crafting Materials, Collectables, Crystals + Materia). Custom rules still available under the Custom Rules tab.
v1.0.0: Initial release. Rule list with vast filter set (category, rarity, equip/item level ranges, class/job, HQ, untradeable, collectable, stackable, equippable, name contains, vendor price, item ID whitelist/blacklist) and per-rule destination bag.
